name: 2-paragraphs-hard-return
markdown:
This is a first paragraph,
on multiple lines.

This is a second paragraph
which has multiple lines too.
html:
This is a first paragraph, on multiple lines.

This is a second paragraph which has multiple lines too.

name: 2-paragraphs-hard-return-spaces
markdown:
This is a first paragraph,
on multiple lines.
     
This is a second paragraph.
There are spaces in between the two.
html:
This is a first paragraph, on multiple lines.

This is a second paragraph. There are spaces in between the two.

name: 2-paragraphs-line
markdown:

A first paragraph.



A second paragraph after 3 CR (carriage return).

A first paragraph.

A second paragraph after 3 CR (carriage return).

markdown:

A few spaces and a new long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long paragraph on 1 line.

A few spaces and a new long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long paragraph on 1 line.

→
1 tab to separate them and a new long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long paragraph on 1 line.

1 tab to separate them and a new long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long paragraph on 1 line.

name: ampersand-text-flow
markdown: An ampersand & in the text flow is escaped as an html entity.
html: An ampersand & in the text flow is escaped as an html entity.

name: ampersand-uri
markdown: There is an [ampersand](http://validator.w3.org/check?uri=http://www.w3.org/&verbose=1) in the URI.

name: asterisk
markdown: This is * an asterisk which should stay as is.
html: This is * an asterisk which should stay as is.

name: asterisk-near-text
markdown: This is \*an asterisk which should stay as is.
html: This is *an asterisk which should stay as is.

name: backslash-escape
markdown:
\\   backslash
\`   backtick
\*   asterisk
\_   underscore
\{\}  curly braces
\[\]  square brackets
\(\)  parentheses
\#   hash mark
\+   plus sign
\-   minus sign (hyphen)
\.   dot
\!   exclamation mark
html: \ backslash ` backtick * asterisk _ underscore {} curly braces [] square brackets () parentheses # hash mark + plus sign - minus sign (hyphen) . dot ! exclamation mark

and a second very long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long line.

But it has two paragraphs.

name: blockquote-nested
markdown:
> This is the first level of quoting.
> > This is nested blockquote.

This is the first level of quoting.

This is nested blockquote.

>
> > This is nested blockquote.

This is the first level of quoting.

This is nested blockquote.

name: blockquote-nested-multiplereturn-level1
markdown:
> This is the first level of quoting.
>
> > This is nested blockquote.
>
> Back to the first level.
html:
This is the first level of quoting.

This is nested blockquote.

Back to the first level.

name: blockquote-nested-return-level1
markdown:
> This is the first level of quoting.
> > This is nested blockquote.
> Back to the first level.
html:
This is the first level of quoting.

This is nested blockquote. Back to the first level.

name: entities-text-flow

name: EOL-CR
markdown: These lines all end with end of line (EOL) sequences.Seriously, they really do.If you don't believe me: HEX EDIT!

name: list-blockquote
markdown:
*   a list containing a blockquote

    > this the blockquote in the list
html:
• a list containing a blockquote

    this the blockquote in the list

name: list-code
markdown:
*   a list containing a block of code

→    10 PRINT HELLO INFINITE
→    20 GOTO 10
html:
• a list containing a block of code

    10 PRINT HELLO INFINITE
20 GOTO 10

name: list-multiparagraphs
markdown:
*   This is a list item with two paragraphs. Lorem ipsum dolor
    sit amet, consectetuer adipiscing elit. Aliquam hendrerit
    mi posuere lectus.

    Vestibulum enim wisi, viverra nec, fringilla in, laoreet
    vitae, risus. Donec sit amet nisl. Aliquam semper ipsum
    sit amet velit.

*   Suspendisse id sem consectetuer libero luctus adipiscing.
html:
• This is a list item with two paragraphs. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetuer adipiscing elit. Aliquam hendrerit mi posuere lectus.

    Vestibulum enim wisi, viverra nec, fringilla in, laoreet vitae, risus. Donec sit amet nisl. Aliquam semper ipsum sit amet velit.

  • Suspendisse id sem consectetuer libero luctus adipiscing.

name: list-multiparagraphs-tab
markdown:
*   This is a list item with two paragraphs. Lorem ipsum dolor
→sit amet, consectetuer adipiscing elit. Aliquam hendrerit
→mi posuere lectus.

→Vestibulum enim wisi, viverra nec, fringilla in, laoreet
→vitae, risus. Donec sit amet nisl. Aliquam semper ipsum
→sit amet velit.

*   Suspendisse id sem consectetuer libero luctus adipiscing.
html:
• This is a list item with two paragraphs. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetuer adipiscing elit. Aliquam hendrerit mi posuere lectus.

    Vestibulum enim wisi, viverra nec, fringilla in, laoreet vitae, risus. Donec sit amet nisl. Aliquam semper ipsum sit amet velit.

  • Suspendisse id sem consectetuer libero luctus adipiscing.

name: unordered-list-unindented-content
markdown:

*   and yet another long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long line.
html:

  • and yet another long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long long line.

    with the same principle.

• This is a list item with the content on multiline and indented.
  • And this another list item with the same principle.
